metadata.description: Custom agent skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: cheat-sheet
plugins.description: Generate a dense, print-ready cheat sheet for exam memorization (AP Physics, AP Calculus, AP Chemistry, GRE, SAT, etc.).

plugins.name: fastapi-scaffold
plugins.description: Scaffold a new FastAPI service with async SQLAlchemy 2.0, Alembic, Pydantic Settings, pytest, Docker, and uv.

plugins.name: terraform-module
plugins.description: Generate GCP Terraform modules with provider config, variables, outputs, and tfvars examples.

plugins.name: mcp-server
plugins.description: Scaffold a new MCP server in Python (FastMCP) or Go (mcp-go) with tools, transport, tests, and CI.

plugins.name: cobra-cli
plugins.description: Scaffold a Go CLI application or subcommand using Cobra with table-driven tests and ldflags versioning.
